chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-1794 0{ 2023 Date Order with signature Of Judge For orders on office objection For hearing o{ CMA No.7757/2023 For hearing of main case 13.02.2024 Petitioners are present in person Mr Ghulam Abbas Kuber, AAG Mr Imran Mobeen Khan APG along with ASHO Raz Muhammad of P S, Pano Aوil HnnHHHn7٦4n ~4٦٦- - Petitioner N٥. 1 has reiterated her freewill marriage WIth Petitioner No2 ٤v٤n after meeting with her mother has made statement to go with her husband Her statement has been recorded by 10 of the Ca5٤. copy of which he has brought on record He further submits that in the light of statement of petitioner No1 he would dispose of the case under "C" class and submit such report before concerned Magistrate After the report submitted by IO the concerned Magistrate shall dispose of the C٥5٤ as recommended within fifteen days Petition accordingly disposed along with Denoing applicationts) SSP Sukkur is directed provide protection tnie couple as and when they approach
